upgrade.limitBody: You've used {used} of {limit} briefs this month. {plan} gets you unlimited briefs, the AI Brief Builder, and PDF export. Your counter resets on the 1st of next month.
upgrade.defaultBody: The feature you just tried isn't available on your current plan. Compare plans to see what's included at each tier.

competitorAnalysis.title: Competitor analysis
competitorAnalysis.body: Compare up to 3 competitor briefs side-by-side and surface a tight differentiation opportunity for your own brief. Available on the Agency plan.

apiAccess.title: API access
apiAccess.body: Analyze briefs programmatically with REST endpoints, personal API keys, and outbound webhooks. Available on the Agency plan.

briefBuilder.title: AI Brief Builder
briefBuilder.body: Get an AI-rewritten brief that fills gaps, sharpens tone, and improves clarity. Available on Pro and up.

teamFeatures.title: Team collaboration
teamFeatures.body: Share briefs with your team, assign roles, and collaborate in one workspace. Available on Team and up.

whiteLabel.title: White-label exports
whiteLabel.body: Export briefs with your agency's branding instead of BriefFill's. Available on the Agency plan.

prioritySupport.title: Priority support
prioritySupport.body: Same-day email support and a dedicated Slack channel for your team. Available on the Agency plan.

exports:pdf.title: PDF export
exports:pdf.body: Export analyzed briefs as branded PDFs. Available on Pro and up.

exports:clipboard.title: Clipboard export
exports:clipboard.body: Copy the structured brief to your clipboard with one click. Available on Pro and up.

exports:google-docs.title: Google Docs export
exports:google-docs.body: Send briefs straight to a Google Doc in your Drive. Available on Team and up.

exports:notion.title: Notion export
exports:notion.body: Save briefs to a Notion database you choose. Available on Team and up.

exports:clickup.title: ClickUp export
exports:clickup.body: Send briefs to a ClickUp list as new tasks. Available on the Agency plan.

exports:airtable.title: Airtable export
exports:airtable.body: Add briefs to an Airtable base as new rows. Available on the Agency plan.

builder.title: AI Brief Builder
builder.saved: Improved brief saved to your project.
builder.failed: Failed to generate improved brief. Please try again.
builder.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.

assistant.title: Brief Assistant
assistant.subtitle: What do you need a brief for?
assistant.placeholder: e.g. A landing page for a fintech startup targeting small business owners…
assistant.describe: Describe what you need a brief for (at least 5 characters)
assistant.needsClient: Add a client name and project name
